name: media
description: Optional image resizing and optimization for uploaded media.
settings_summary: When enabled, Media processes newly uploaded JPEG, PNG, GIF, and WebP images before they are stored. Existing uploads are never changed.
settings_notes: Images larger than the maximum width or height are resized proportionally. Smaller images are left as they are.
JPEG quality and PNG compression only apply when an image is written after resizing.
PHP GD must be enabled on the server. If it is unavailable, uploads are kept unchanged.

settings.label: Maximum width
settings.description: Resize larger images before they are published.

settings.label: Maximum height
settings.description: Resize taller images before they are published.

settings.label: JPEG quality
settings.description: Quality used when saving JPEG uploads.

settings.label: WebP quality
settings.description: Quality used when saving WebP uploads.

settings.label: PNG compression
settings.description: Compression level used when saving PNG uploads.

settings.label: Resize GIF images
settings.description: Allow resizing GIF uploads. Animated GIFs may be flattened, so this is disabled by default.
